meaning: vt.吸(气),鼓舞,感动,激发,启示,使生灵感,产生vi.吸入,赋予灵感
examples: He has neither the policies nor the personal charisma to inspire people.
We must promote originality, inspire creativity and encourage innovation.
Subjects were picked to inspire or entertain.
Perhaps a memento from his time at Wellcome might inspire him in difficult times ahead.
This on the ground content was then used to inspire creative projects to inspire civic engagement.
